phrases.intent_en: Ask where the greenhouse is located
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la serre du jardin botanique ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah SAIR doo zhar-DAN boh-tah-NEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardin Botanique de Tours has a 19th-century greenhouse featuring tropical and Mediterranean plant collections.

responses.english: At the back of the garden, on the left.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN doo zhar-DAHN ah GOHSH
responses.french: Au fond du jardin, à gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the garden is free to enter
phrases.text_local: L'entrée du jardin botanique est-elle gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lahn-TRAY doo zhar-DAN boh-tah-NEEK ay-TEL grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardin Botanique de Tours is free and open to the public year-round, though some sections may have restricted hours in winter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what plants are in bloom now
phrases.text_local: Quelles plantes sont en fleur en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel PLAHNT son ahn FLUR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The garden features a rose collection, medicinal herb garden, and rare trees; seasonal blooms vary from spring roses to late-summer dahlias.

responses.english: The rose bushes are blooming right now.
responses.phonetic: lay roh-ZYAY sohn tahn FLUR ahn suh moh-MAHN
responses.french: Les rosiers sont en fleur en ce moment.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a children's play area
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un espace de jeu pour les enfants dans le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un es-PASS duh ZHUH poor lay zahn-FAHN dahn luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: The botanical garden is a popular family destination in Tours, with a small zoo and play area that children can enjoy alongside the plant collections.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are guided botanical walks
phrases.cultural_note: Guided botanical walks are occasionally offered by the city of Tours; the tourist office can provide current schedules.
